scripts.db:migrate: docker compose exec -T postgres psql -U cdcs -d cdcs -f /sqls/01_init.sql
scripts.db:reset: docker compose exec -T postgres psql -U cdcs -d cdcs -c 'drop table if exists blocks; drop table if exists documents;' && bun run db:migrate
scripts.db:load: docker compose exec -T postgres psql -U cdcs -d cdcs -f /sqls/02_data.sql
scripts.db:dump: docker compose exec -T postgres pg_dump -U cdcs -d cdcs --data-only --no-owner --no-privileges -t documents -t blocks > sqls/02_data.sql
